ops.title: Ship v0.21.0: one CLI flag vocabulary (+ did-you-mean hints, global show)
ops.description: Harmonize the agent-facing CLI surface: task/sprint/project --desc→--body, note/doc/log --tag→--label, search --anchor-*→bare, task move absorbed into task edit --branch, sprint activate, criterion pending, log append --entry; shared flag binders; did-you-mean unknown-flag/command hints; kind-agnostic top-level show. Plan: ~/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-07/plans/bash-echo-linked-pie.md

ops.text: v0.21.0 released and tap bumped; task add --body/--label works in a fresh install
old spelling (task add --desc) exits 2 with a did-you-mean hint naming --body
cc-notes show <id> resolves any entity kind; ecosystem surfaces (mcpserver, hooks, skill docs) all speak the new vocabulary
